Data module for tzutrader - Data Streaming API

Imports

core

Types

CBHistory = ref object of DataStreamer
  startTime*: int64
  endTime*: int64
  granularity*: CoinbaseGranularity
  apiKey*: string
  apiSecret*: string
Coinbase data streamer for cryptocurrency data Uses Coinbase Advanced Trade API 
CoinbaseGranularity = enum
  OneMinute = "ONE_MINUTE", FiveMinute = "FIVE_MINUTE",
  FifteenMinute = "FIFTEEN_MINUTE", ThirtyMinute = "THIRTY_MINUTE",
  OneHour = "ONE_HOUR", TwoHour = "TWO_HOUR", SixHour = "SIX_HOUR",
  OneDay = "ONE_DAY"
Coinbase candle granularities 
CSVDataStream = ref object
  filename*: string
  data*: seq[OHLCV]
  index*: int
  symbol*: string
CSV-based data stream for backtesting Reads OHLCV data from CSV files 
CSVFileStreamer = ref object of DataStreamer
  filename*: string
CSV-based data streamer following pybottrader API 
DataStream = ref object
  symbol*: string
  interval*: Interval
  cache*: seq[OHLCV]
  cacheStart*: int64
  cacheEnd*: int64
  useCache*: bool
Legacy data stream for a specific symbol (for backward compatibility) 
DataStreamer = ref object of RootObj
  index*: int
  data*: seq[OHLCV]
  symbol*: string
  label*: string
Base data streamer class - all streamers inherit from this Provides unified API: next(), result(), reset() 
Interval = enum
  Int1m = "1m",             ## 1 minute (max ~7 days history)
  Int5m = "5m",             ## 5 minutes (max ~60 days history)
  Int15m = "15m",           ## 15 minutes (max ~60 days history)
  Int30m = "30m",           ## 30 minutes (max ~60 days history)
  Int1h = "1h",             ## 1 hour (max ~2 years history)
  Int1d = "1d",             ## 1 day (unlimited history)
  Int1wk = "1wk",           ## 1 week (unlimited history)
  Int1mo = "1mo"             ## 1 month (unlimited history)
Time intervals for data fetching 
Quote = object
  symbol*: string
  timestamp*: int64
  regularMarketPrice*: float64
  regularMarketChange*: float64
  regularMarketChangePercent*: float64
  regularMarketVolume*: float64
  regularMarketOpen*: float64
  regularMarketDayHigh*: float64
  regularMarketDayLow*: float64
  regularMarketPreviousClose*: float64
Real-time quote data 
YFHistory = ref object of DataStreamer
  startTime*: int64
  endTime*: int64
  interval*: Interval
Yahoo Finance data streamer Retrieves historical data from Yahoo Finance

Procs

String representation of CSV stream 
proc `$`(stream: CSVFileStreamer): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
String representation of CSV file stream 
proc `$`(stream: YFHistory): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
String representation of Yahoo Finance stream 
proc addToCache(ds: DataStream; data: seq[OHLCV]) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Add data to cache 
proc clearCache(ds: DataStream) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Clear the data stream cache 
proc fetch(ds: DataStream; days: int): seq[OHLCV] {....raises: [DataError], tags: [
    TimeEffect, RootEffect, ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect,
    WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Fetch historical data for the last N days 
proc fetch(ds: DataStream; startTime, endTime: int64): seq[OHLCV] {.
    ...raises: [DataError], tags: [RootEffect, ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect,
                                ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Fetch historical OHLCV data for the time range Uses cache if available and valid 
proc fetchHistoryYfnim(ds: DataStream; startTime, endTime: int64): seq[OHLCV] {.
    ...raises: [DataError], tags: [RootEffect, ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect,
                                ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Fetch historical data using yfnim Raises DataError if the request fails 
proc fetchMultiple(symbols: seq[string]; startTime, endTime: int64;
                   interval: Interval = Int1d): Table[string, seq[OHLCV]] {.
    ...raises: [DataError], tags: [RootEffect, ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect,
                                ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Fetch data for multiple symbols 
proc fetchQuoteYfnim(symbol: string): Quote {....raises: [DataError], tags: [
    RootEffect, ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect,
    TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Fetch current quote using yfnim Raises DataError if the request fails 
proc generateMockOHLCV(symbol: string; startTime, endTime: int64;
                       interval: Interval; startPrice: float64 = 100.0;
                       volatility: float64 = 0.02): seq[OHLCV] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

Generate mock OHLCV data for testing

Args: symbol: Stock symbol startTime: Start timestamp (Unix) endTime: End timestamp (Unix) interval: Time interval between bars startPrice: Starting price (default 100.0) volatility: Daily volatility as decimal (default 0.02 = 2%)

proc generateMockQuote(symbol: string; price: float64 = 100.0): Quote {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Generate a mock quote for testing 
proc getCached(ds: DataStream; startTime, endTime: int64): seq[OHLCV] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get data from cache for the specified time range 
proc getQuote(symbol: string): Quote {....raises: [DataError], tags: [RootEffect,
    ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect],
                                       forbids: [].}
Get current quote for a symbol 
proc getQuotes(symbols: seq[string]): Table[string, Quote] {.
    ...raises: [DataError], tags: [RootEffect, ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect,
                                ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Get quotes for multiple symbols 
proc hasNext(stream: CSVDataStream): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if stream has more data 
proc isCached(ds: DataStream; startTime, endTime: int64): bool {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if requested time range is in cache 
proc latest(ds: DataStream): OHLCV {....raises: [DataError], tags: [TimeEffect,
    RootEffect, ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect],
                                     forbids: [].}
Get the most recent OHLCV bar 
proc len(stream: CSVDataStream): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get total number of bars in stream 
proc maxHistory(interval: Interval): int64 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newCBHistory(symbol: string; start: string; endStr: string = "";
                  interval: Interval = Int1d): CBHistory {....raises: [DataError,
    DataError, ProtocolError, SslError, Exception, IOError, TimeoutError], tags: [
    ReadEnvEffect, TimeEffect, RootEffect, ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect,
    WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}

Create a new Coinbase history streamer

Reads credentials from environment variables:

  • COINBASE_API_KEY
  • COINBASE_SECRET_KEY

Args: symbol: Trading pair (e.g., "BTC-USD", "ETH-USD") start: Start date in ISO format (e.g., "2023-01-01") endStr: End date in ISO format (empty = now) interval: Time interval (default: 1d)

Example: let stream = newCBHistory("BTC-USD", "2023-01-01", "2023-12-31", Int1d) while stream.hasNext(): let bar = stream.next() if bar.isSome: echo bar.get

proc newCSVDataStream(filename: string; symbol: string = ""): CSVDataStream {.
    ...raises: [IOError, DataError], tags: [ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}

Create a new CSV data stream

Args: filename: Path to CSV file symbol: Optional symbol name (extracted from filename if not provided)

Example: let stream = newCSVDataStream("data/AAPL.csv") for bar in stream.items(): echo bar

proc newCSVFileStreamer(filename: string; symbol: string = ""): CSVFileStreamer {.
    ...raises: [IOError, DataError], tags: [ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}

Create a new CSV file streamer

Args: filename: Path to CSV file symbol: Optional symbol name (extracted from filename if not provided)

Example: let stream = newCSVFileStreamer("data/AAPL.csv") while stream.hasNext(): let bar = stream.next() if bar.isSome: echo bar.get

proc newDataStream(symbol: string; interval: Interval = Int1d;
                   useCache: bool = true): DataStream {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create a new data stream for a symbol 
proc newYFHistory(symbol: string; start: string; endStr: string = "";
                  interval: Interval = Int1d): YFHistory {.
    ...raises: [DataError, DataError], tags: [TimeEffect, RootEffect,
    ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}

Create a new Yahoo Finance history streamer

Args: symbol: Ticker symbol (e.g., "AAPL", "BTC-USD") start: Start date in ISO format (e.g., "2023-01-01") endStr: End date in ISO format (empty = now) interval: Time interval (default: 1d)

Example: let stream = newYFHistory("AAPL", "2023-01-01", "2023-12-31") while stream.hasNext(): let bar = stream.next() if bar.isSome: echo bar.get

proc next(stream: CSVDataStream): OHLCV {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get next bar from stream Raises IndexDefect if at end of stream 
proc peek(stream: CSVDataStream): OHLCV {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get current bar without advancing Raises IndexDefect if at end of stream 
proc readCSV(filename: string; hasHeader: bool = true): seq[OHLCV] {.
    ...raises: [IOError, DataError, DataError], tags: [ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}

Read OHLCV data from CSV file

CSV Format: timestamp,open,high,low,close,volume 1609459200,100.0,105.0,95.0,102.0,1000000.0

Args: filename: Input CSV file path hasHeader: Skip first line if true (default true)

Returns: Sequence of OHLCV bars

proc remaining(stream: CSVDataStream): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get number of remaining bars 
proc reset(stream: CSVDataStream) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Reset the stream to the beginning 
proc toSeconds(interval: Interval): int64 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Convert interval to seconds 
proc writeCSV(data: seq[OHLCV]; filename: string; includeHeader: bool = true) {.
    ...raises: [IOError], tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}

Write OHLCV data to CSV file

CSV Format: timestamp,open,high,low,close,volume 1609459200,100.0,105.0,95.0,102.0,1000000.0

Args: data: OHLCV data to write filename: Output CSV file path includeHeader: Include column headers (default true)

Methods

method hasNext(ds: DataStreamer): bool {.base, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if there are more observations 
method len(ds: DataStreamer): int {.base, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns total number of observations 
method next(ds: DataStreamer): Option[OHLCV] {.base, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the next observation and advances the index Returns None if at end of stream 
method reset(ds: DataStreamer) {.base, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Resets the counter to 0 
method result(ds: DataStreamer): Option[OHLCV] {.base, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns the current observation without advancing Returns None if at end of stream

Iterators

iterator items(ds: DataStreamer): OHLCV {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Iterate over all bars in any data streamer 
iterator items(stream: CSVDataStream): OHLCV {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Iterate over all bars in stream 
iterator stream(ds: DataStream; startTime, endTime: int64): OHLCV {.
    ...raises: [DataError], tags: [RootEffect, ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect,
                                ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Stream OHLCV data one bar at a time
